generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring angular position and velocity for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind gearbox measuring angular position and velocity for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorData
]

instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance SimulatedTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

instance SysML_BDD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) for structural modeling of the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML_Enabler
]

instance SysML_IBD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram (IBD) for structural modeling of the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML_Enabler
]

instance Simulink_CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Coulomb-Viscous friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Enabler
]

instance Simulink_StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Stribeck friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Enabler
]

instance Simulink_DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Dahl friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Enabler
]

instance Simulink_LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for LuGre friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Enabler
]

instance DataTrace_MeasuredTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque data trace for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTT_Enabler
]

instance DataTrace_SimulatedTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque data trace from friction models for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTT_Enabler
]

instance DataTrace_AngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity data trace for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTT_Enabler
]

instance DataTrace_MotorCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current data trace for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTT_Enabler
]

instance SysML_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance Simulink_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation of friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AAS_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for data integration of the MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTT_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming time-series data from physical sensors to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, FrictionAnalysisVisualizationService
]

instance Dashboard_Visualization_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for real-time friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement via model-based control for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementAction
]

instance FrictionAnalysisVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard visualization of friction analysis for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionAnalysisVisualization
]

instance JointFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights on joint friction used to adjust control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance FrictionAnalysisVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard visualization of friction analysis for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of control algorithms for improved motion accuracy based on friction insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FirstAxis_System : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "The first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot, comprising a permanent magnet synchronous motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox, with a working range of [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed of 75°/s, used for machining applications."
]

instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains FirstAxis_System
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming with MQTT, though specific update frequency is not documented."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating data traces, engineering models (SysML), simulation models (Simulink), processing components for data calculation, and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) to link sensor data with system behavior."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), using live sensor data during robot operation for friction model refinement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation via comparison of simulated data against measured data to detect friction loss deviations, with models refined based on discrepancies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data transmission from physical sensors to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards and SysML modeling standards."
]
